---
title: "Brian Helsel"
listing:
  contents: code
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-placeholder: "https://github.com/bhelsel/2026-RLAB-Practical-Exercises/raw/main/images/rlab-placeholder.png"
  image-height: 200px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

<div class="profile">
  <img src="https://brianhelsel.netlify.app/images/HelselBC.jpg">
</div>

**Professioal Background**

Dr. Brian Helsel is an Assistant Professor with the University of Kansas
Alzheimer's Disease Research Center in the Department of Neurology at the
University of Kansas Medical Center. He has a background in exercise physiology
and physical activity epidemiology and is interested in understanding the role
of exercise for promoting brain health in adults with Down syndrome.
